assertions.title: HEAD /healthz is supported as a bodyless readiness probe

steps.expected: Both GET and HEAD subtests pass

steps.action: Verify HEAD subtest checks status code is 200
steps.observed: Line 106-108: if rr.Code != http.StatusOK { t.Fatalf(...) } — confirmed present

steps.action: Verify HEAD subtest checks empty body
steps.observed: Line 109-111: if rr.Body.Len() != 0 { t.Fatalf("expected empty body for HEAD request, got %q", ...) } — confirmed present

steps.action: Verify GET subtest checks status 200 and JSON body with status=ok
steps.observed: GET subtest asserts status 200, parses JSON body, and verifies status field equals "ok" — confirmed present

evidence.network: in-process httptest — no real network calls

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. TestHealthz/GET returns 200 with {"status":"ok"}, TestHealthz/HEAD returns 200 with empty body — both subtests pass.
